title: deltaVision raises €10.2M to build the plumbing for in-orbit refuelling
summary: Munich-based space startup deltaVision has raised €10.2 million in its first outside funding round, money earmarked for scaling production of the valves, pumps and pressure regulators that shuttle propellant around spacecraft.
caption: output/2026-07-21/deltavision-raises-10-2m-to-build-the-plumbing-for-in-orbit-refuelling.txt
